meta.tagline: Islamic AI-Powered Ethical Growth Intelligence Consultancy
meta.process_framework: Ihsaan Flow™ (Niyyah, Ikhlas, Ihsan, Rida, Amanah, Barakah)
meta.non_negotiable_rule: No automated output reaches clients without human review

workflows.name: New Lead Flow
workflows.state_machine: IDENTIFIED → SECTOR_SCREENED → ENRICHED → ETHICS_EVALUATED → OUTREACH_DRAFTED → IHSAAN_REVIEWED → HASAN_APPROVED → SEQUENCE_LIVE → REPLIED → DISCOVERY_BOOKED → PROPOSAL_ISSUED → CLOSED → CONTRACT_GENERATED (AGENT_14) → ONBOARDING | NOT_A_FIT (content nurture) | COLD (content nurture, 90-day window)

workflows.name: Audit Delivery Flow
workflows.trigger: Audit invoice paid and onboarding questionnaire received
workflows.success_condition: Audit delivered, NPS 8+, upsell conversation opened
workflows.state_machine: BRIEFED → SCOPE_CONFIRMED → DATA_COLLECTED → ANALYSIS_COMPLETE → REPORT_DRAFTED → IHSAAN_REVIEWED → ETHICS_CHECKED → HASAN_APPROVED → DELIVERED → NPS_CAPTURED → UPSELL_ASSESSED → UPSELL_READY / NURTURE_ONLY

workflows.name: Content Flow
workflows.success_condition: 4 posts, 1 newsletter published, 1+ inbound lead attributed
workflows.state_machine: CYCLE_START → PERFORMANCE_REVIEWED → CALENDAR_PLANNED → GEO_AEO_BRIEFED (AGENT_08 provides AI search structure guidance) → HASAN_APPROVED → CONTENT_PRODUCED → IHSAAN_REVIEWED → ETHICS_CHECKED → HASAN_REVIEWED → SCHEDULED → PUBLISHED → ENGAGEMENT_MONITORED → METRICS_CAPTURED → CYCLE_END

workflows.name: Upsell Flow
workflows.success_condition: Client moves to next tier with genuine enthusiasm

workflows.name: Campaign Flow
workflows.success_condition: Campaign KPIs met, honest report delivered
workflows.state_machine: BRIEF_RECEIVED → ETHICS_SCREENED → STRATEGY_DEVELOPED → CLIENT_APPROVED_STRATEGY → CREATIVE_PRODUCED → IHSAAN_REVIEWED → ETHICS_CHECKED → CLIENT_APPROVED_CREATIVE → PAGE_BUILT → LAUNCHED → OPTIMISING → REPORTING → EXTENDED / COMPLETED

workflows.name: Automation Flow
workflows.success_condition: Automation running, documented, with override, Hasan has full visibility

workflows.name: Growth Flow
workflows.success_condition: Hasan makes informed strategic decisions for next period
workflows.state_machine: MONTH_START → PHASE_CHECK (AGENT_15 active? If not, Hasan provides forecasts manually) → PERFORMANCE_REVIEWED (AGENT_10) → FORECAST_UPDATED (AGENT_15, Phase 3+) → CLIENT_HEALTH_REVIEWED (AGENT_09) → ETHICS_AUDIT (AGENT_06) → HASAN_STRATEGIC_REVIEW → DECISIONS_LOGGED

sidq.name: Truthfulness
sidq.definition: Every claim, projection, case study, and testimonial must be verifiably true. No exaggeration, no spin, no selective omission that creates false impressions.
check_questions: Is every factual claim in this output verifiable?
Are any statistics from credible, citable sources?
Does this output create any false impression, even through selective truth?
Would Hasan be comfortable defending every statement publicly?
Are any projections or estimates clearly labelled as such, not presented as certainties?

amanah.name: Trustworthiness
amanah.definition: Numu acts as a trusted custodian of client data, money, and reputation. Deliver what is promised. Charge only what is earned. Never exploit information asymmetry.
check_questions: Does this output honour all commitments made to the client?
Is the recommended service genuinely in the client's best interest?
Are we proposing a price commensurate with the value delivered?
Does this automation or communication act in Hasan's name with his full knowledge?
Are we using any information the client shared in confidence in a way they wouldn't expect?

adl.name: Justice
adl.definition: Fair dealing with all parties — clients, prospects, competitors, and the public. Honest reporting. Fair pricing. No exploitation of vulnerability.
check_questions: Is this pricing fair given the value and the client's situation?
Are we presenting campaign results honestly, including underperformance?
Does this content or ad target vulnerable people in an exploitative way?
Are we speaking about competitors fairly and truthfully?
Would a fair-minded observer consider this treatment just?

grandfather_principle.name: Grandfather Principle
grandfather_principle.definition: Existing client pricing and commitments are locked for the duration of their engagement. Price increases only apply to new clients or new scope. Loyalty is rewarded, never punished.
check_questions: Is this client being offered the same or better terms than when they signed?
Have any price increases been communicated with adequate notice?
Is any upsell framed as an addition, not a replacement of existing value?

APPROVED.meaning: Output passes all four ethics pillars. May proceed to next step.

FLAGGED.meaning: Output raises a concern that requires human judgment. Not necessarily a violation — needs Hasan review.
FLAGGED.action: Workflow PAUSES. Notification sent to Hasan. Hasan makes final decision within 4hrs. If no response: treat as REJECTED.

REJECTED.meaning: Output clearly violates one or more ethics pillars. Must not proceed.
REJECTED.action: Workflow STOPS. Output returned to originating agent with specific violation reason and remediation guidance. Hasan notified. Incident logged in Ethics Audit Log.

mandatory_checkpoints.check: Ihsaan Flow review on audit report — all 6 principles scored before Ethics Gate
Ihsaan Flow review on content — all 6 principles scored before Ethics Gate
Ihsaan Flow review on creative — all 6 principles scored before Ethics Gate
Ihsaan Flow review on outreach sequences — all 6 principles scored before Hasan review
Ihsaan Flow review on upsell proposal — all 6 principles scored before Hasan review

ihsaan_flow_protocol.name: Ihsaan Flow™
ihsaan_flow_protocol.operator_all_phases: AGENT_16 (active from Phase 1, cannot be suspended or bypassed)
ihsaan_flow_protocol.pipeline_position: PRODUCTION → [AGENT_16 Ihsaan Flow Review] → [AGENT_06 Ethics Gate Review] → DELIVERY

niyyah.name: Intention
niyyah.core_question: Is the purpose behind this work clear, noble, and aligned with Numu's values?

ikhlas.name: Sincerity
ikhlas.core_question: Is the approach honest and free from ego, performance, or manipulation?

ihsan.name: Excellence
ihsan.core_question: Was the work executed with precision, craftsmanship, and genuine mastery?

rida.name: Contentment
rida.core_question: Was the process approached with patience and respect — not rushed or pressured?

amanah.name: Trust
amanah.core_question: Was responsibility honoured toward all stakeholders and their entrusted resources?

barakah.name: Blessing
barakah.core_question: Is this work oriented toward enduring benefit and legacy, not just immediate delivery?

AMBER.action: Return with improvement guidance. Agent revises. Rescore. Maximum 2 cycles.

RED.range: below 18 OR any single principle scored 1
RED.action: HALT. Do not proceed. Escalate to Hasan with full 6-principle breakdown.

review_points: Pre-project (Kickoff): Are we starting with clear intention and the right reasons?
Mid-project (Execution): Is the work being done with sincerity, care, and excellence?
Post-project (Before Delivery): Does the final output reflect the six principles?

verdict_types.AMBER: Return with specific improvement notes per principle. Max 2 revision cycles.
verdict_types.RED: HALT. Escalate to Hasan immediately with full 6-principle scoring breakdown.

phase_1.label: Foundation & First Revenue
phase_1.primary_focus: Generate first 10 audit clients. Build content engine. Establish outreach system. Hasan leads all delivery personally.

phase_2.label: Scale & Systematise
phase_2.primary_focus: Add CRM management, campaign strategy, funnel building. Begin retainer conversion. First Founder's Circle cohort planning.

phase_3.label: Optimise & Expand
phase_3.primary_focus: Full ethics monitoring active. Revenue intelligence online. Founder's Circle launch. All systems optimised.

phase_4.label: Full Operational Capacity
phase_4.primary_focus: All 16 agents fully operational. Year 1 target achievement (£132K-£171K). Year 2 planning commenced.

priority_hierarchy.description: Active client work — audits, sprints, retainer deliverables, campaigns. A client deadline beats everything. If resource conflict arises, active client delivery always wins.
Any active Ethics Gate evaluation, flag, or violation. Ethics always supersedes commercial pressure. An ethics review in progress pauses all associated workflow steps until resolved.
Live deals with proposals outstanding, discovery calls booked, or replies requiring response. Time-sensitive commercial opportunities that could go cold.
Content production and scheduling. Builds brand, generates inbound. Important but not time-critical in the same way as client delivery or live sales.
Cold and warm outreach sequence management. Pipeline building. Important for long-term but lowest-urgency of revenue-generating activities.
CRM hygiene, reporting, automation maintenance, system updates. Important for health of business but should never displace the above.

failure_modes.failure: Ethics Gate REJECTED on outreach sequence
failure_modes.immediate_action: Halt sequence activation. Return to AGENT_02 with specific violation and remediation notes.
failure_modes.recovery: AGENT_02 revises sequence addressing all flagged issues. Re-submit for Ethics Gate. Maximum 2 revision cycles before escalation to Hasan for manual rewrite.

failure_modes.immediate_action: Escalate to Hasan within 1 hour. AGENT_07 prepares remediation options.
failure_modes.recovery: Hasan calls client personally within 24 hours. Remediation plan agreed. Additional deliverable at no charge considered. No upsell until NPS recovers to 8+.

failure_modes.immediate_action: Flag to Hasan. Prepare pause recommendation with analysis.
failure_modes.recovery: Client call to discuss options: pause and replan, budget reduce, audience/creative refresh. Never continue spending against a demonstrably failing strategy.

failure_modes.immediate_action: Pause automation immediately. Assess blast radius (how many clients/prospects affected?).
failure_modes.recovery: AGENT_10 diagnoses and fixes root cause. AGENT_07 contacts affected clients with honest explanation and apology. Hasan reviews and approves all client communications about the error.

failure_modes.failure: Lead in prohibited sector passed through by AGENT_01 in error
failure_modes.immediate_action: Halt entire workflow for that lead. Do not enrich, do not outreach.
failure_modes.recovery: Archive lead with sector violation reason. Ethics incident logged. AGENT_01 prompt reviewed for gap that allowed the error.

failure_modes.failure: Year 1 revenue forecast more than 30% below target by Month 6
failure_modes.immediate_action: Emergency growth review convened by Hasan with AGENT_09 and AGENT_15 data.
failure_modes.recovery: Strategy review: pricing, positioning, lead volume, conversion rates. Identify single highest-leverage action. Do not panic-sell. Never compromise ethics for revenue.

failure_modes.failure: Key agent produces outputs with systematic ethics drift
failure_modes.immediate_action: Pause agent. AGENT_06 (THE ETHICS GUARDIAN, Phase 1+) or Hasan (if escalation required) conducts full audit of recent outputs.
failure_modes.recovery: Revise agent prompt/system prompt to close the drift. Re-test with sample tasks. Reactivate only after passing comprehensive ethics evaluation.
failure_modes.escalation_threshold: Any pattern detected — 3+ similar ethics flags from same agent

failure_modes.failure: Ihsaan Flow RED verdict on deliverable
failure_modes.immediate_action: HALT delivery. Return to originating agent with full 6-principle breakdown and specific failure reasons per principle.
failure_modes.recovery: Agent addresses specific principle failures. AGENT_16 rescores. Maximum 2 revision cycles before Hasan intervention.
failure_modes.escalation_threshold: Hasan intervention if 2 cycles fail to achieve GREEN, or if Niyyah (intention) scores 1 at any point.

daily_rhythm.06_00: AGENT_09 compiles overnight metrics. Lead inbox checked.
daily_rhythm.07_00: AGENT_01 begins daily lead research and enrichment cycle.
daily_rhythm.08_00: AGENT_02 reviews any new enriched leads for sequence readiness.
daily_rhythm.09_00: AGENT_09 delivers weekly dashboard (Mondays only). All agents receive daily summary.
daily_rhythm.10_00: Hasan reviews overnight content performance, outreach replies, and Ethics Gate flags.
daily_rhythm.10_00-13_00: Priority 1 work: client delivery — audits, sprint work, retainer deliverables.
daily_rhythm.13_00-15_00: Priority 3 work: active sales — discovery calls, proposal reviews, follow-ups.
daily_rhythm.15_00-17_00: Priority 4 work: content review and approval. Outreach sequence approvals.
daily_rhythm.17_00: End-of-day pipeline update. AGENT_08 logs all deal movements.
daily_rhythm.18_00: AGENT_09 captures daily metrics. AGENT_05 schedules next-day content.
daily_rhythm.weekly_monday: Content calendar planning. AGENT_09 weekly dashboard. AGENT_07 client health review.
daily_rhythm.weekly_friday: End-of-week performance review. Pipeline audit. Outreach sequence review for next week.
daily_rhythm.monthly_day_1: AGENT_09 delivers monthly board pack. AGENT_15 updates revenue forecast (Phase 3+).
daily_rhythm.monthly_day_3: Hasan strategic review session using board pack.

sprint.name: 90-Day Growth Sprint
sprint.note: Requires prior Audit. Sprint implements top recommendations from audit.

retainer_base.name: Monthly Growth Retainer
retainer_base.note: Earned after Sprint demonstrates value. Not sold. Scope and price agreed case-by-case.

campaign.name: Campaign Management
campaign.billing: Per campaign or monthly management fee
campaign.note: Phase 2+ service. AGENT_11 (Campaign Architect) handles strategy and execution. No dedicated paid media agent — Hasan manages paid execution in Phase 1-2.

founders_circle.name: Founder's Circle
founders_circle.note: Exclusive group for established Muslim business founders. Phase 3+ launch.

triggers: Lead in sensitive or ambiguous sector
Campaign underperforming >30% below KPI after 2 weeks
Revenue forecast >30% below target at Month 6
Systematic ethics drift detected in any agent
Any Ihsaan Flow RED verdict (process failure — halt delivery immediately)
Any Ihsaan Flow principle scored 1 (indicates fundamental process failure, especially Niyyah)
Repeated AMBER verdicts (3+ from the same workflow) suggesting systemic process weakness
Any request that requires compromising an ethics pillar
Request to send unsolicited bulk communications
Any situation not covered by these protocols
escalation_to_hasan.contact_method: Immediate Notion alert + flag in relevant workflow
escalation_to_hasan.non_negotiable: Hasan is the final authority on all ethics decisions. No agent may override a Hasan ruling.

principles.retainers_are_earned: A retainer is never sold. It is earned through demonstrated value at each rung of The Ladder. An audit must be delivered and found valuable before a Sprint is proposed. A Sprint must be delivered and found valuable before a retainer is proposed.
principles.islamic_ethics_always_wins: When modern marketing practice conflicts with Islamic ethics (Sidq, Amanah, Adl), Islamic ethics prevails without exception. Revenue is never a justification for compromising principles.
principles.no_automated_client_contact: No automated output — email, LinkedIn message, report, proposal, or any other communication — may reach a client or prospect without Hasan's prior review and approval.
principles.grandfather_principle: Existing client pricing is locked for the duration of their engagement. Price increases only affect new clients or new scope. Loyalty is rewarded.
principles.honest_over_impressive: When reporting results to clients, honest data is more important than impressive data. An honest report of a campaign that underperformed, with a clear improvement plan, is more Amanah than a polished report that hides the truth.
